function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0003
alias: northstar_backfill_gamma
issued_on: 2025-12-29
total_eur: 530
counterparty: Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH
project: Northstar Ledger
related_entity: Nina Schreiber
lines:
  - item: operator workflow discovery sprint
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 185
    line_eur: 185
  - item: follow-up timeline prototype review
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 240
    line_eur: 240
  - item: buyer-language refinement memo
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 105
    line_eur: 105
---
# Northstar buyer-language sprint invoice

```text
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| field          | value                         |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                       |
| invoice_number | INV-0003                      |
| alias          | northstar_backfill_gamma      |
| issued_on      | 2025-12-29                    |
| total_eur      | 530                           |
| counterparty   | Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH |
| project        | Northstar Ledger              |
| related_entity | Nina Schreiber                |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                                | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | operator workflow discovery sprint  | 1   | 185      | 185      |
| 2 | follow-up timeline prototype review | 1   | 240      | 240      |
| 3 | buyer-language refinement memo      | 1   | 105      | 105      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                               |     |          | 530      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

A backfilled invoice from the period when Miles was trying to make the language sound like one product instead of three.

function.message: Done. I handled the next inbox message by OCR-structuring `50_finance/invoices/2025_12_29__eur_000530__inv_0003__northstar_backfill_gamma.md`: added YAML frontmatter with the required invoice fields and line items from visible note data, preserved the existing note body below the frontmatter, kept the change focused, and then removed the processed inbox file `00_inbox/000_next-task.md`.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap and nested AGENTS requirements; used inbox-processing and migration workflows; used finance frontmatter schema; preserved original body exactly beneath frontmatter; deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly asked to OCR and add YAML frontmatter to the specified invoice. The target invoice contained all required schema fields (`record_type`, `invoice_number`, `alias`, `issued_on`, `total_eur`, `counterparty`, `project`, `lines`) plus optional `related_entity`, so no guessing was required. Structured metadata was written accordingly and the processed inbox file was deleted per workflow.
